dulux-diamond-distinction-interior.note: Both are top-tier consumer interior latex with premium washability and self-cleaning/dirt-resistance claims. Emerald is SW's equivalent flagship.
BM Aura is the direct flagship equivalent — both offer unmatched washability, hide, and colour accuracy at the premium tier.
Cloverdale's premium interior latex. Strong regional presence in BC and Alberta.

dulux-anti-scuff-interior.note: SW Duration Home offers good scrubbability and durability but lacks a dedicated anti-scuff marketing claim.
BM Scuff-X is a direct competitive product targeting scuff resistance — the closest true equivalent.

dulux-diamond-interior-latex.note: SW Cashmere is the closest spec match — both are premium washable interior latex at the same quality tier.
BM Regal Select and Dulux Diamond are direct equivalents — both are the second-tier premium lines below each brand's flagship.

dulux-ultra-interior.note: SW Emerald is the direct premium-tier competitor — both are flagship consumer interior latex with excellent washability.
BM Aura matches at the same premium tier with comparable colour accuracy and washability.
Cloverdale's premium line — relevant comparison in Western Canada.

dulux-ultra-classic-interior-latex.note: SW Cashmere matches on premium mid-tier positioning with similar smooth application and washability.
BM Regal Select is the direct equivalent at the professional-preferred premium tier.
Cloverdale's contractor-grade interior paint — close match for regional competitive situations.

dulux-ultra-classic-7700-interior-latex.note: SW ProMar 200 is the benchmark contractor interior paint at this tier.
BM ben is a professional-grade interior latex at the same value-premium tier.
Cloverdale's standard contractor interior — relevant for BC and Alberta comparisons.

dulux-lifemaster-interior-latex.note: SW Harmony is the closest equivalent — zero added VOC, marketed for sensitive environments. Both carry LEED IEQ credit eligibility.
BM Natura is zero VOC and directly targets the same sensitive/LEED market.

dulux-xpert-interior-latex.note: SW's flagship contractor interior paint — both X-Pert and ProMar 200 are professional-grade with wide sheen/base availability.
BM ben is a good value professional interior latex. Slightly less coverage but good workability.
Cloverdale's contractor-grade interior — covers this tier for Western Canada specs.

glidden-pro-interior-latex.note: SW ProMar 400 is the direct economy contractor equivalent — both are the value-end professional lines.
BM Ultra Spec 500 targets the same economy contractor segment and is a direct cross.

dulux-kitchen-bath-interior-latex.note: SW typically recommends Emerald in Semi-Gloss for wet areas — no dedicated Kitchen & Bath SKU.
BM Aura Bath & Spa is the direct equivalent — purpose-built for wet/humid environments with mould inhibitors.

dulux-lifemaster-ceiling.note: SW ProMar Ceiling is the direct-use competitor for commercial ceiling applications.
BM Waterborne Ceiling is the zero-VOC ceiling paint equivalent — same low-spatter, flat finish market.
Cloverdale ceiling-specific flat finish — relevant in Western Canada.

dulux-xpert-ceiling-ready-mix.note: SW ProMar Ceiling is the go-to contractor ceiling comparison — both are contractor-ready flat white.
BM Waterborne Ceiling Paint is a direct category match for flat ceiling applications.

dulux-xpert-supermatt-interior.note: SW Emerald in flat/matte finish is the closest premium equivalent for ultra-matte wall applications.
BM Aura Flat provides premium matte finish comparable to X-Pert Supermatt.
Cloverdale flat interior — good category comparison in regional markets.

glidden-speedwall-interior-latex.note: Both are economy contractor interior paints targeting the production/new construction market.
BM Ultra Spec 500 is the direct economy contractor equivalent.

speedwall-interior-latex.note: SW ProMar 400 is the direct economy contractor equivalent for production painting.
BM Ultra Spec 500 covers the same economy production painting segment.
Cloverdale's economy contractor line — relevant for BC builder comparisons.

dulux-lifemaster-interior-primer.note: SW Harmony zero-VOC primer is the direct equivalent for sensitive environment / LEED primer applications.
BM Fresh Start in the low-VOC formulation is the closest equivalent for sensitive environment priming.

dulux-ultra-classic-drywall-primer.productName: ProMar® 200 Zero VOC Interior Latex Primer
dulux-ultra-classic-drywall-primer.note: SW ProMar primer for new drywall — covers the same new construction primer market.
BM Fresh Start is a versatile all-purpose primer that covers new drywall applications well.
Cloverdale's standard drywall primer — regional comparison for new construction.

dulux-ultra-interior-latex-primer.note: SW PrepRite Classic is the direct equivalent — both are general-purpose interior latex primers.
BM Fresh Start All-Purpose is the standard cross for general interior priming applications.

dulux-xpert-high-build-primer-sealer.note: SW PrepRite High Build is the direct equivalent for filling rough drywall before topcoats.
BM Fresh Start High-Hiding is a close match — good filling and hide properties.

dulux-xpert-interior-primer-sealer.note: SW PrepRite ProBlock is the direct equivalent stain-blocking primer for problem surfaces.
BM Fresh Start covers the same general priming and sealing use cases.
Cloverdale's interior primer sealer — relevant regional comparison.

glidden-pro-interior-primer-sealer.note: SW ProMar Interior Primer is the direct economy contractor equivalent.
BM Ultra Spec 500 Primer matches on the economy contractor tier.

glidden-speedwall-interior-primer.note: SW ProMar Interior Primer is the direct economy/production primer equivalent.
BM Ultra Spec 500 Primer is the standard economy contractor primer cross.

dulux-xpert-waterborne-alkyd-emulsion.note: SW Emerald Urethane Trim is the premium waterborne alkyd equivalent for doors, trim, and cabinets.
BM Advance is the market-leading waterborne alkyd — excellent cabinet and trim comparison.

glidden-ultra-interior-alkyd-calcimine-r.note: SW PrepRite alkyd primer is the closest equivalent for recoating chalky/calcimine surfaces.
BM Fresh Start Alkyd covers the same calcimine recoating scenario.

dulux-diamond-exterior-latex.note: SW Emerald Exterior is the direct premium exterior equivalent.
BM Aura Exterior — direct match on tier, performance, and target application.
Cloverdale's premium exterior line — good for Western Canada comparisons.

dulux-weatherguard-exterior-acrylic.note: SW Duration Exterior and WeatherGuard target the same professional exterior market — both offer extended repaint cycles.
BM Regal Select Exterior — contractor-preferred mid-premium exterior line.
Cloverdale Weather-Tuff is a direct regional comparison for Western Canada exterior projects.

dulux-weatherguard-exterior-primer.note: SW Loxon is the direct masonry/exterior primer equivalent for CMU and concrete substrates.
BM Fresh Start Masonry is the standard exterior masonry primer cross.
Cloverdale exterior masonry primer — regional comparison.

dulux-cwf-uv5-penetrating-wood-finish.note: This IS the same product — Flood CWF-UV5 is made by PPG/Dulux and sold under the Flood brand by SW. Identical formulation.
BM Woodlux is a penetrating oil finish for similar applications.
Cloverdale penetrating wood sealer — close category match for deck and siding.

dulux-prof-wood-solid-acrylic-stain.note: SW SuperDeck Solid and ProWood Solid Acrylic Stain are direct competitors in the professional solid exterior stain market.
BM Arborcoat Solid — 100% acrylic solid exterior stain, direct cross.
Cloverdale solid exterior stain — strong in Western Canada deck and siding market.

dulux-prof-wood-semitrans-acrylic-oil-st.note: SW SuperDeck Semi-Trans is the direct professional semi-transparent stain competitor.
BM Arborcoat Semi-Transparent is the direct equivalent — acrylic-oil semi-transparent exterior stain.
Cloverdale semi-transparent stain — popular in BC and Alberta.

dulux-prof-wood-semitrans-oil-finish.note: Flood CWF-UV5 is a direct oil penetrating finish in the same category.
BM Arborcoat Semi-Trans in oil formula is the closest cross for penetrating oil finishes.

dulux-prof-wood-readymix-semitrans-oil-s.note: Flood CWF-UV5 in ready-mixed natural tone is the direct equivalent for penetrating oil sealer applications.
BM Woodlux covers the same penetrating oil sealer use case.

dulux-woodpride-semi-trans.note: SW SuperDeck Semi-Trans is a direct competitive match for residential semi-transparent deck and siding stains.
BM Arborcoat Semi-Transparent is the direct equivalent — both are acrylic-oil semi-transparent exterior stains.
Cloverdale's semi-transparent stain line — strong regional competitor.

dulux-woodpride-solid-acrylic-stain.note: SW SuperDeck Solid and Woodpride Solid Acrylic are direct competitors in the residential solid exterior stain market.
BM Arborcoat Solid is the direct equivalent — 100% acrylic solid exterior stain.
Cloverdale solid stain — relevant regional comparison.

dulux-woodpride-solid-oil-acrylic-stain.note: SW SuperDeck Solid covers this oil-acrylic blend solid stain category directly.
BM Arborcoat Solid is the direct equivalent for solid deck and siding stain.

dulux-xpert-interior-exterior-wb-alkyd-p.note: SW All Surface Primer is the contractor-preferred interior/exterior waterborne alkyd primer.
BM Fresh Start Alkyd is the equivalent for cross-use interior/exterior alkyd priming.

dulux-metalclad-rust-preventative-exteri.note: SW DTM Acrylic is the direct equivalent — both are water-based rust-preventative DTM coatings for exterior ferrous metal.
Carboline Carbomastic 15 is solvent-based with higher performance — use when enhanced corrosion resistance is specified.

dulux-metalclad-rust-preventative-exteri.productName: IronClad® Alkyd Low Lustre Metal & Wood Enamel
dulux-metalclad-rust-preventative-exteri.note: BM IronClad covers metal protection — close on category but IronClad is alkyd vs. Metalclad's acrylic DTM version.

dulux-metalclad-interior-exterior-alkyd.note: SW industrial alkyd enamel — equivalent on performance tier and substrate.
Carboline Carbomastic 15 is a higher-performance solvent-borne product for demanding corrosion environments.
BM IronClad Alkyd is the direct competitor — both are traditional oil-alkyd rust-preventative enamels.

dulux-wb-polyurethane-acrylic-floor-enam.note: SW Heavy Duty Floor is the direct competitor — both are water-based floor coatings for residential and commercial concrete.
BM Floor & Patio is the category equivalent for residential and light commercial floor applications.
Carboline Carboguard 60 for industrial floor applications — relevant when spec calls for higher performance.

dulux-gripper-primer-sealer.note: SW Extreme Bond and Dulux Gripper are direct equivalents — both bond to glossy surfaces without sanding.
BM Fresh Start is the closest equivalent — excellent adhesion primer, slightly less aggressive on very glossy surfaces.
Cloverdale adhesion primer — regional comparison for bonding primer applications.

dulux-xpert-interior-exterior-latex-bloc.note: SW Loxon Block Surfacer is the direct equivalent for filling CMU and concrete block prior to topcoats.

dulux-xpert-interior-exterior-latex-bloc.productName: Super Spec® HP Masonry Block Filler
dulux-xpert-interior-exterior-latex-bloc.note: BM Super Spec HP Block Filler is the direct equivalent — both fill CMU block for topcoat systems.
Carboline block filler — appropriate comparison for industrial/commercial CMU block fill specs.

glidden-pro-interior-exterior-latex-bloc.note: SW Loxon Block Surfacer covers the same CMU block fill application at the economy contractor tier.

glidden-pro-interior-exterior-latex-bloc.productName: Super Spec® HP Masonry Block Filler
glidden-pro-interior-exterior-latex-bloc.note: BM Super Spec HP Block Filler — direct economy contractor cross for masonry block filling.

dulux-spray-master-100-acrylic-dryfall.note: SW DryFog is the direct competitor for commercial dryfall applications — same overspray technology.
BM Speedhide Dryfall — direct category competitor for commercial ceiling spray applications.

dulux-spray-master-dtm-dryfall-acrylic-l.note: SW DryFog DTM is the direct competitor for metal/DTM dryfall applications on exposed structural steel.
BM Speedhide Dryfall is the closest equivalent — may not have a dedicated DTM variant.
Carboline DTM coating is relevant for industrial specs requiring direct-to-metal corrosion protection with spray application.

dulux-spray-master-dryfall-alkyd-enamel.note: SW DryFog Alkyd Enamel is the direct equivalent for alkyd dryfall applications.
BM Speedhide Alkyd Dryfall — direct competitor for solvent-borne dryfall applications.

dulux-spray-master-100-acrylic-dryfall-2.note: SW DryFog Latex is the direct equivalent dryfall product in the same product family.
BM Speedhide Dryfall — standard commercial dryfall category competitor.

dulux-spray-master-dtm-dryfall-acrylic-l.note: SW DryFog DTM is the direct equivalent for this DTM dryfall variant.
BM Speedhide Dryfall — close match; confirm DTM availability with BM rep.

dulux-spray-master-acrylic-dryfall-750da.note: SW DryFog Latex — direct competitor in this dryfall product variant.
BM Speedhide Dryfall — direct category competitor.

break-through-low-voc-door-trim-cabinet.note: SW Emerald Urethane Trim Enamel is the direct equivalent — both are waterborne alkyd enamels for doors, trim, and cabinets at the premium tier.
BM Advance is the market-leading waterborne alkyd for cabinetry — excellent comparison product with proven kitchen cabinet track record.

perma-crete-acrylic-masonry-surface-seal.note: SW Loxon is the closest masonry sealer/primer for priming concrete and masonry prior to topcoating.
BM Fresh Start Masonry Primer covers the same surface sealing and priming function.
Carboline Carboguard 60 provides surface sealing on concrete in industrial applications.

perma-crete-aqua-pel-clear-water-repelle.note: SW H&C Clear Concrete Sealer is the direct clear water repellent equivalent for concrete and masonry.
BM clear masonry sealer covers the same water repellent application for concrete block and masonry.

perma-crete-color-seal-wb-concrete-stain.note: SW H&C Concrete Stain is the direct competitor in the decorative concrete stain category.
BM concrete stain covers the same decorative concrete sealing market.

perma-crete-high-build-acrylic-topcoat.note: SW Loxon XP is a high-build masonry topcoat with similar waterproofing claims.
BM MoorGard covers masonry exterior — category match but lower build than Perma-Crete High Build.

perma-crete-pitt-flex-elastomeric-patchi.note: SW Loxon Elastomeric covers patching and waterproofing for masonry — close match on elastomeric masonry applications.
BM Elastomerix covers elastomeric masonry patching and waterproofing.

perma-crete-pitt-flex-elastomeric-topcoa.note: SW Loxon Elastomeric is the direct competitor — both are elastomeric masonry topcoats with crack-bridging claims.
BM Elastomerix covers the same high-movement masonry waterproofing segment.

perma-crete-plex-seal-wb-clear-sealer.note: SW H&C Clear is the direct clear waterborne masonry sealer equivalent.
BM clear masonry waterproofer covers the same clear sealer application.

top-gun-200xi-siliconized-acrylic-sealan.note: GE Supreme is a consumer siliconized sealant — close match for residential caulking applications.
Tremco Tremflex 834 is a siliconized acrylic sealant commonly specified in commercial construction.

top-gun-210x-elastomeric-acrylic-sealant.note: Tremco Tremflex 834 is a direct competitor for elastomeric acrylic sealants in commercial construction.
Sikaflex-1a is a one-component elastomeric sealant — close match for most commercial building applications.

top-gun-250xi-fast-dry-sealant.note: Tremco Dymonic FC is a fast-cure sealant used widely in commercial glazing and curtain wall applications.
Sikaflex-15LM is a low-modulus fast-cure sealant for joint sealing and construction applications.

top-gun-300xi-elastomeric-sealant.note: Tremco Tremflex 881 is a direct competitor for high-movement elastomeric acrylic sealants.
Sikaflex-1a is a widely specified one-component elastomeric sealant for high-movement joints.

top-gun-350-silicone-sealant.note: GE Supreme Silicone 2 — similar all-purpose 100% silicone for glazing and non-porous substrates.
Sikasil is widely specified for commercial glazing — appropriate for structural silicone applications.

top-gun-400-elastomeric-acrylic-urethane.note: Tremco Dymonic 100 is a direct competitor for elastomeric polyurethane/urethane hybrid sealants in commercial joints.
Sikaflex-2c NS is a two-component urethane sealant for high-movement structural and traffic joints.

top-gun-flex-urethane-sealant.note: Tremco Dymeric 240FC is the direct competitor for one-component urethane sealants in construction and curtain wall.
Sikaflex-1a is a widely accepted one-component polyurethane sealant for construction joints.
